audited_flows: Router A/B ECDSA-HSS registration, export, recovery, refresh, and normal-signing boundary
Wallet SDK Router A/B ECDSA-HSS wire parser, JWT rehydration, request digest binding, and active-session identity
Wallet SDK Router A/B Ed25519 normal-signing prepare/finalize RPC, presign-pool refill, and budget-bound response binding
Wallet SDK Router A/B Ed25519 wallet-session authority parsing, persisted-state classification, runtime worker-material validation, and NEAR readiness gating

entries.flow: Router A/B ECDSA-HSS registration, export, recovery, refresh, and normal-signing boundary
highest_severity_findings: Registration and export requests do not enforce lifecycle.work_kind
Active-state session ids are collision-prone because they join unconstrained fields with ':'
recommended_next_flows: Wallet SDK Router A/B ECDSA-HSS wire parser and JWT/session rehydration boundary
Cloudflare Router A/B ECDSA-HSS prepare/finalize handlers
Cloudflare durable-object active-signing-worker lookup and ECDSA presignature pool state

entries.flow: Wallet SDK Router A/B ECDSA-HSS wire parser, JWT rehydration, request digest binding, and active-session identity
highest_severity_findings: Finalize request digests omit budget_reservation_id and budget_operation_id
Active-state session ids are collision-prone because they join unconstrained fields with ':'
recommended_next_flows: Wallet SDK Router A/B ECDSA-HSS finalize RPC and digest/response binding
Wallet SDK Router A/B ECDSA-HSS persisted session rehydration and runtime material validation
Cloudflare Router A/B ECDSA-HSS finalize budget validation and active-signing-worker lookup

entries.flow: Wallet SDK Router A/B Ed25519 normal-signing prepare/finalize RPC, presign-pool refill, and budget-bound response binding
highest_severity_findings: Ed25519 prepare responses are not request-bound before the SDK uses server_verifying_share_b64u, server_commitments, and budget metadata
recommended_next_flows: Wallet SDK Router A/B Ed25519 wallet-session rehydration and runtime material validation keys
Cloudflare SigningWorker Ed25519 finalize materialization and explicit share-consistency invariant tests
Cloudflare Router Ed25519 prepare/finalize budget operation binding and finalize metadata validation

entries.flow: Wallet SDK Router A/B Ed25519 wallet-session authority parsing, persisted-state classification, runtime worker-material validation, and NEAR readiness gating
highest_severity_findings: Expired Ed25519 wallet sessions still parse as signable and can survive as runtime_validated ready state
recommended_next_flows: Wallet SDK NEAR Ed25519 readiness, reconnect, and lane-planning branches that trust persisted Router A/B state
Wallet SDK Ed25519 canonical session-record persistence and current-session commit lifetime policy
Wallet SDK threshold warm-session bootstrap and Ed25519 fact upsert flow
